title: pyrus peduncularis
intro: Pyrus peduncularis, also known as the Chinese pear, is a species of pear tree native to China. The bark, leaves, and fruit of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus peduncularis include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating digestive issues, as well as having antioxidant and anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, while the fruit is eaten raw or used in jams and preserves.
